BRT corridor in the Bronx where Bx12 SBS was launched in June 2008
Bx12 SBS corridor, providing a key crosstown transit connection in the Bronx.

Bus corridor serving Bx9, Bx12 SBS/Local, Bx17, Bx22, B-L 60, B-L 61, B-L 62. 113,700 weekday riders (NYCT routes only), 53,100 use the Bx12 SBS and Local.
